flow_points: West Indies struggled early, losing 3 wickets for 55 runs in the Powerplay.
AU Rashid delivered a crucial spell for England, taking 2 wickets for just 16 runs.
SE Rutherford anchored West Indies' innings, contributing 38.8% of the team's runs.
West Indies shifted momentum with a high-scoring finish in the Death Overs, achieving a run rate of 13.2.
England had a strong Powerplay, scoring 67 runs for 1 wicket with an 11.17 run rate.
G Motie delivered a crucial spell for West Indies, taking 3 wickets for 33 runs.
Motie sustained defensive pressure, finishing with an impact score of 111.67.
England struggled under extreme chase pressure (Index: 100.0), leading to a late-innings collapse.
West Indies won the match by 30 runs.
